Test Case Title: Verify toggling the Collapse/Expand arrow hides and shows the search panel
Test Steps:
1- click on the up-arrow icon on the right side of 'Employee Reports' bar.
2- observe the search form.
3- click the same arrow icon again.
Expected Result: the search section collapses and expands and becomes completely hidden and visible.

Test Case Title: Verify that default pre-defined reports are loaded and counted correctly
Test Steps: 1- observe the table and the total records counter below the search panel.
Expected Result: the table displays the pre-defined reports, and the text shows exactly (4) Records Found.

Test Case Title: Verify searching for a report for a valid name
Test Steps:
1- enter a valid report name in report name field
2- select the report from the dropdown list.
3- click search.
Expected Result: the table updates to display only the selected report.

Test Case Title: Verify clicking 'Reset' clears the search field and restores all reports
Test Steps:
1- type any text in 'Report Name' and click search.
2- click Reset button.
Expected Result: the search field is cleared, and the table displays all 4 default records again.

Test Case Title: Verify that an error message is displayed when entering invalid name in report name field
Test Steps:
1- enter invalid report name in report name field
2- click search

Test Case Title: Verify that the system displays the generated report data page when clicking the document icon for a specific report
Test Steps:
1- locate any report row (e.g., Employee Job Details).
2- click on the document icon on the right side of the row.
Expected Result: the system displays the generated report data page

Test Case Title: Verify that the user is redirected to the configuration page when clicking on edit icon
Test Steps:
1- locate any report row (e.g., Employee Job Details).
2- click on the edit icon on the right side of the row.
Expected Result: the user is redirected to the configuration page

Test Case Title: Verify that a confirmation pop-up message is displayed when clicking the delete icon for a specific report
Test Steps:
1- locate any report row (e.g., Employee Job Details).
2- click on the delete icon on the right side of the row.
Expected Result: a confirmation message is displayed "The selected record will be permanently deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?"
